subcodes.first_line: O dear daughter! Praise be to God that obstacles have passed away and again we begin correspondence. I did not forget thee in these times.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز الحمد لله موانع زائل دوباره بمکاتبه پرداختیم درین مدت تو را
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @second birth, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
